title: Mamele
writer: Szmul Goldstein, Mojzesz Nudelman, Meyer Schwartz
actors: Molly Picon, Edmund Zayenda, Gertrude Bulman
plot: Mamele embraces the entire gamut of interwar Jewish life in Lodz - tenements and unemployed Jews, nightclubs and gangsters, religious Jews celebrating Sukkot - but the film belongs to Molly Picon who romps undaunted through her du...
